title: Revival
synopsis: A group of archaeologists open a tomb that awakens horrible monsters, while journeyman Yusuke Godai is compelled to access a strange belt from the tomb to fight back against them.

title: Transformation
synopsis: A drunkard witnessed a murder by an Unidentified Lifeform near a church. Meanwhile, Yusuke is bothered by the idea of fighting and is unsure if it was right until he saw the daughter of one of the slain archaeologists crying.

title: Tokyo
synopsis: Yusuke Godai leaves the message, 'I've returned to Tokyo because of some important business. But I will return tonight.'

title: Sprint
synopsis: As #5 continues to rampage with her speed through Tokyo, Ichijou must come to a decision regarding whether to work alongside Yusuke.

title: Distance
synopsis: Through his combination with Detective Ichijo, Yusuke Godai a.k.a. Kuuga is victorious over the Unidentified Lifeform #5, Zu-Mebio-Da.

title: Azure Dragon
synopsis: In the battle against Unidentified Lifeform #6, Zu-Batsu-Ba, who had been appearing frequently in the Suginami ward, Kuuga's body changed from red to blue.

title: Grief
synopsis: Three months have passed since the series of events with the Unidentified Lifeforms broke out.

title: Archer
synopsis: During the battle with the bee-type monster Me-Badjisu-Ba that approaches from the sky, Kuuga's body changes from blue to green.

title: Siblings
synopsis: At the combined investigation headquarters of Ichijo and other detectives, they confirm that the Unidentified Lifeforms have a habit of gathering in one location.

title: Fierceness
synopsis: As Yusuke tries to convince Minori to accept his changes, he tries to figure out a method to bring out the fourth Kuuga form.

title: Promise
synopsis: Yusuke's plan to meet with a former teacher to keep an old promise is interrupted by the attack of a powerful Gurongi.

title: Teacher
synopsis: Sakurako helps Yusuke's former teacher renew his confidence, all while Yusuke works on a new move for Kuuga to defeat the rhino Gurongi.

title: Suspicion
synopsis: While a new discovery at the Kuuga tomb begins to emerge, Ichijo investigates a man with a neck tattoo seen at the scene of a Gurongi massacre aboard a ferry.

title: Omen
synopsis: Kuuga escapes battle with Unidentified Lifeform No. 23. While being treated for his injuries, Yusuke is reunited with someone who has turned their back on life.

title: Armor
synopsis: Ichijo feels the pressure of working on an important day as he and Yusuke try to decipher the truth of the mysterious artifact flying toward Tokyo.

title: Creed
synopsis: With the Gurongi case seemingly over, Yusuke has his bike and its new armor studied as Ichijo tries to reach out to his sick mother.

title: Preparation
synopsis: A recap of the past battles between Kuuga and the Gurongi, in the midst of Yusuke facing a powerful opponent.

title: Loss
synopsis: When Yusuke becomes poisoned by a sickly Gurongi, his friends and allies must come together to figure out what to do next.

title: Artifact
synopsis: Tsubaki and Sakurako try to find a way of saving Yusuke's life as Ichijo and the police continue to track down the deadly mushroom Gurongi.

title: Smile
synopsis: Yusuke catches up with his friends after his death scare as Me-Ginoga-De returns once again.

title: Secrets
synopsis: Ichijo tracks the Bat Gurongi as it flies between Tokyo and Nagano for an unknown reason, as a Gurongi begins a new assault to gain a promotion in rank.

title: Game
synopsis: As Ichijo continues to track the Bat Gurongi and deal with the tricky Me-Galme-Re, he makes new discoveries regarding the motives behind the Gurongi attacks.

title: Uneasiness
synopsis: Yusuke and Sakurako worry about Kuuga's increasing power and the Rider's increased pain as the last 'Me' Gurongi makes her move at promotion.

title: Strengthening
synopsis: With his powers uncontrollable and Me-Garima-Ba unable to be defeated on his own, Yusuke tries to find the means to master the growing power within Kuuga.

title: Wandering
synopsis: Yusuke's old teacher worries for an elusive student who skips school to go to Tokyo, just as the first Go-level Gurongi starts his game.

title: Myself
synopsis: While dealing with his first Go-level opponent, Yusuke tracks down his teacher's student to help him face his problems.

title: Ripple
synopsis: Minori's friend frets over the future of her unborn child in a world with the Gurongi, as a new Go-level begins to attack swimming pools.

title: Clarification
synopsis: Yusuke and Ichijo try to discover a pattern to the Go-level Gurongi to find the clue for stopping Go-Bemiu-Gi's watery attacks.

title: Crossroads
synopsis: Tsubaki tries to explain and warn about Yusuke's new upgrades, while a former problem prepares for a contest amid a Gurongi attack.

title: Fate
synopsis: Junichi bemoans where he belongs in the midst of the Gurongi crisis while Yusuke realizes what he must do to defeat the defense of Go-Gamego-Re.

title: Retaliation
synopsis: In the aftermath of his previous battle, Yusuke recaps the evolution of Kuuga's Rising form while Go-Badaa-Ba finally begins his Gegel.

title: Obstacle
synopsis: As Yusuke is outclassed by Go-Badaa-Ba, Ichijo tries to find the means to defeat it, held up by the police's fears of Kuuga's growing power.

title: Cooperation
synopsis: As Yusuke struggles to find a way of stopping Go-Badaa-Ba, Ichijo makes a last-ditch effort to obtain the upgraded bike for Kuuga by any means necessary.

title: Tremble
synopsis: Yusuke and Ichijo investigate a Gurongi massacring boys at a high school, while a murder summons Sakurako back to Nagano for further investigation.

title: Emotion
synopsis: Unidentified Lifeform #42, the porcupine-type Go-Jaraji-Da, is given the rule to kill Midorikawa Academy's second-year boys and repeatedly murders.

title: Complication
synopsis: Following a realization, Sakurako and Ichijo enter the Gurongi tomb to find new clues on the mysterious #0 as two Gurongi battle in Tokyo.

title: Approach
synopsis: Sakurako makes a discovery regarding Kuuga's further evolution even as Goma continues to interfere with the pursuit of the Gegel mastermind.

title: Transition
synopsis: Balva, Goma and Sakurako hint at the threat of Daguva's return, even as Yusuke and the police try to figure out #43's pattern.

title: Goma
synopsis: With a dual crisis, Yusuke must manage Go-Zazalu-Ba so he can deal with the rampaging Xu-Goma-Gu, who keeps killing to draw out Daguva.

title: Impulse
synopsis: Yusuke, Sakurako, Ichijo and Enokida discuss Kuuga, #0 and the mysterious final prophecy as another Gurongi begins attacking airplanes.

title: Control
synopsis: Yusuke comforts Nana and tries to help her understand acting in regards to an exercise associated with the Gurongi massacres.

title: Battlefield
synopsis: After an extremely intense battle with a powerful Gurongi, Yusuke and his allies discuss the connections between Kuuga and his opponents.

title: Reality
synopsis: Ichijo goes to support Mika in a flute contest, where he gets involved in a hostage crisis in progress.

title: Crisis
synopsis: Enokida tries to balance her work and her motherly duties as the final Go-level Gurongi uses a tactic to guarantee passage through the Final Gegel.

title: Archenemy
synopsis: As Yusuke is defeated by the strengthened Go-Gadol-Ba, Enokida rushes to complete the Nerve-Shattering Bullets even at the risk of estranging her son.

title: Indomitable
synopsis: Sakurako convinces Tsubaki to do another upgrade for Yusuke to handle Gadol, while Jean assists Enokida with her connection to her son.

title: Decision
synopsis: Through the efforts of Kuuga and the police, Unidentified Lifeform #46 Go-Gadoru-Ba is defeated. However, it simultaneously means #0 will bring forth the ultimate darkness.

title: Kuuga
synopsis: Yusuke resolves to become the 'dreadful warrior' to defeat #0, and before the final battle he rides through the downpour to thank all the people who supported him.

title: Yusuke
synopsis: To defeat N-Daguba-Zeba, Yusuke transforms into the Ultimate Form. Staining the white snow field with crimson in a literal fight to the death, at last the conclusion is reached.
